message:
feat(tests): add web framework integration test suite (A.16)

Comprehensive integration tests for the asupersync::web module covering:
- Router composition (nesting, fallback, method dispatch, wildcards, path params)
- All extractor types (Path, Query, Json, Form, State, Cookie, CookieJar, RawBody, HeaderMap)
- All response types (Json, Html, Redirect, StatusCode, tuples, Result, Bytes, unit)
- Middleware stack (CORS, auth, rate limiting, timeout, catch-panic, composition)
- SSE events (basic, keep-alive, last-event-id, multiline data)
- Health check endpoints (liveness, readiness, startup, degraded states)
- Session management (MemoryStore, SessionLayer)
- Error handling (404, 405, extraction failures, edge cases)
- Full app composition test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
